overview: A San Diego men's health clinic offering physician-guided evaluation and treatment for testosterone therapy, erectile dysfunction, weight management, and wellness concerns. All treatment plans begin with comprehensive lab work and medical review by a licensed provider.
highlights: Lab work and medical evaluation before treatment decisions
Board-certified physician with hormone-focused care experience
Private, confidential care with no insurance reporting
targetAudience: Men in San Diego seeking physician-guided care for hormone health, sexual health, and wellness optimization.
